title: Brown & Brown, Inc. (BRO) CEO Powell Brown on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 26, 2022 8:00 AM ET CompanyParticipants Powell Brown - President & Chief Executive Officer Andy Watts - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Elyse Greenspan - Wells Fargo Greg Peters - Raymond James Mark Hughes - Truist Weston Bloomer - UBS Yaron Kinar - Jefferies Derek Han - KBW Mark Hughes - Truist Michael Phillips - Morgan Stanley Operator Please standby, we are about to begin. Good morning and welcome to the Brown & Brown, Inc. First Quarter Earnings Call.

title: Brown & Brown's (BRO) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Brown & Brown's (BRO) first-quarter 2022 results reflect higher commission and fees and organic growth, offset by lower investment income.

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4% and 1.36%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 5 Insurers Poised to Beat Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Better pricing, exposure growth, accelerated digitalization and sturdy capital are expected to help PRA, VOYA, HIG, BRO, and AFL outperform Q1 earnings estimates.

title: Has Brown & Brown (BRO) Outpaced Other Finance Stocks This Year?
text: Here is how Brown & Brown (BRO) and CF Bankshares Inc. (CFBK) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Here's Why You Should Stay Invested in Brown & Brown (BRO)
text: Segmental outperformance, strategic buyouts and a solid financial position well poise Brown & Brown (BRO) for growth.
